narrative:
Kenston Local Sd (Geauga) school district has 14,823 registered voters, with 53.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 29.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 17.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 12.2 percentage points. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean +0.1% D−R vs -20.4% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
